name: LLM Search
tagline: Perplexity-style answers with live web search, citations, and streaming
description: Ask questions in natural language. Default mode runs a WebLLM model in the browser (no API keys) with Wikipedia retrieval via public CORS APIs. Optional Cloud mode uses Tavily or Brave plus OpenAI on the server. Citations, streaming, sidebar history — local chats use browser storage; cloud chats use disk on the server.

env_vars.description: Required. Chat completions for synthesis and query rewrite.
Alternative web search if Tavily is unset (Brave Search API).
Optional. Session storage directory (default: ./data in container).
